skills.name: Ram Muay
skills.description: Assume an active Ram Muay attack stance. Unlocks Nak Muay skills and converts basic attacks. Basic attack speed increases with skill level.
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor: SkillFactor % x 2
Effect of [Ram Muay] Buff
* Ignores 10% of enemy Defense to Nak Muay skill attack
Increases the attack speed of basic attack by CaptionRatio

skills.name: Te Kha
skills.description: Strikes the lower half of the enemy. The targeted enemy becomes immobile for 1.5 seconds. Increases damage by 50% against Small-sized enemies and bosses. Can be used only when the Ram Muay buff is active.
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor: SkillFactor % x 4
+50% damage to Small-sized enemies and bosses
Can be used after adopting the Ram Muay stance

skills.name: Sok Chiang
skills.description: Slash the enemy with your elbow to inflict [Bleeding] debuff on the enemy. Can be used only when the Ram Muay buff is active.
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor: SkillFactor % x 4
Duration of [Bleeding] CaptionTime seconds
* Duration limited to 3 seconds against bosses
Can be used after adopting the Ram Muay stance

skills.name: Te Trong
skills.description: Attack the enemy with a powerful kick. The kicked enemy spins and gets knocked down. Can be used only when the Ram Muay buff is active.
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor: SkillFactor % x 2
Can be used after adopting the Ram Muay stance

skills.name: Khao Loi
skills.description: Hit the enemy with a flying knee kick. Can be used only when the Ram Muay buff is active.
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor: SkillFactor % x 2
Can be used after adopting the Ram Muay stance

skills.name: Muay Thai
skills.description: Final damage of Nak Muay skill increases for the duration.
skills.effect_text:
Increases Final Damage by CaptionRatio %
Duration: 30 minutes

attributes.name: Te Kha: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [Te Kha] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Sok Chiang: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [Sok Chiang] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Te Trong: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [Te Trong] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Khao Loi: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [Khao Loi] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Ram Muay: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [Ram Muay]'s basic attacks by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: [Arts] Ram Muay: Enhanced Upgrade
attributes.description: * Increases the Skill Factor of [Ram Muay] by 1.25% per attribute level

attributes.name: [Arts] Te Kha: Enhanced Upgrade
attributes.description: * Increases the Skill Factor of [Te Kha] by 1.25% per attribute level

attributes.name: [Arts] Sok Chiang: Enhanced Upgrade
attributes.description: * Increases the Skill Factor of [Sok Chiang] by 1.25% per attribute level

attributes.name: [Arts] Te Trong: Enhanced Upgrade
attributes.description: * Increases the Skill Factor of [Te Trong] by 1.25% per attribute level

attributes.name: [Arts] Khao Loi: Enhanced Upgrade
attributes.description: * Increases the Skill Factor of [Khao] by 1.25% per attribute level

attributes.name: [Arts] Muay Thai: Muay Boran
attributes.description:
* Nak Muay final damage increase effect of [Muay Thai] is removed and following skills are applied

* Only Nak Muay skill and buff can be used for the duration and when inflicting normal attacks, learned Te Kha, Te Trong, Sok Chiang is automatically activated

* Automatically casts skills are considered as normal skills and final damage increases

* Increased Final damage rate is in proportion to the number of automatically cast skill (Te Kha, Te Trong, Sok Chiang) learned and Muay Thai skill level

- Final Damage +[10 + skill level * number of skills * 0.35]%

- Duration : 20 seconds

attributes.name: [Arts] Khao Loi: Khao Trong
attributes.description: * When using Khao Loi, teleport and give damage to the targeted enemy, applying [Stun] on the target for 1.5 seconds

attributes.name: Nak Muay: Additional Damage
attributes.description: * Additional damage increases by [ATK x 10% per attribute level]
